[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] '''Nox Vellam''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] high-ranking [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official during the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==Biography==
Vellam was Governor-General of the [[Bright Jewel Oversector/Legends|Bright Jewel Oversector]], which included the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]]; because he had failed to locate the Rebel base on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] before the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] removed five of the most important planets from his oversector and placed them under the direct rule of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], and reassigned his loyal [[Sector Group/Legends|Sector Group]] commander [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Amise Griff]] to Vader's command.

Vader, however, was still in a healing trance aboard his [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE Fighter]], and a minor civil war broke out between the Imperial forces in Bright Jewel Oversector, as the Governor-General dispatched the Star Destroyer [[Eradicator (Imperial-class)|''Eradicator'']] to hunt down the elite [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sodarra]], which had been tasked with returning Vader to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. This brought [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] and [[Avenger/Legends|''Avenger'']] into the area against the man now regarded, in the words of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]], as a "renegade governor".

==Behind the scenes==
[[Empire 14|''Empire'' 14]] has portrayed Vader crashing his TIE Fighter after Yavin on the outpost world of [[Vaal/Legends|Vaal]] and returning to Imperial Center from there in a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]].

Confusingly, the ''Executor'' is supposed to have entered service under Admiral Griff during the final stages of the blockade of Yavin, but she already appears under the command of [[Kendal Ozzel/Legends|Kendal Ozzel]] in ''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]'', implicitly earlier in the timeline.

More recently, [[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] shows Ozzel as [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], while the ''Executor'' is already in commission under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Bentro]].
